overall.description: First-person exploration through a dark sci-fi industrial facility with dramatic red and green accent lighting. The player moves through narrow ventilation corridors, opens into a central hub with an A3 elevator, passes through server rooms, and ascends a metal stairwell. High-quality game engine rendering with metallic surfaces, grated floors, and atmospheric volumetric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: red-lit ventilation shaft corridor with industrial fan

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through narrow corridor with red emergency lighting, passing large spinning ventilation fan

entered.detail: large industrial spinning fan with metal blades mounted in wall niche
perforated metal floor grating with red light filtering through from below
horizontal red fluorescent tubes lining the corridor walls
riveted metal panel walls with vertical slats

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow industrial corridor bathed in red emergency lighting. A large spinning ventilation fan dominates the right wall while the camera moves forward over metal grate flooring. The environment is claustrophobic with metal panel walls and red neon tubes providing the only illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark maintenance corridor with green indicator lights

events.description: transitioning from bright red-lit corridor to darker section with single green accent light strip

agents.ego_description: proceeding through dimly lit maintenance tunnel toward a distant doorway with green lighting

entered.detail: horizontal green LED strip light above doorway indicating access
open doorway frame leading to next section of facility

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the red-lit ventilation shaft into a darker maintenance corridor. A green status light strip becomes visible on the left wall, marking the transition to a lower-light environment. The metal grating continues as the camera approaches an open doorway leading deeper into the facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: central hub chamber with A3 elevator and storage areas

events.description: exiting narrow corridor into larger open hub area with overhead lighting and A3 elevator

agents.ego_description: entering spacious hub area and surveying the A3 elevator and surrounding storage containers

entered.detail: large industrial elevator with illuminated red interior and A3 designation on frame
large rectangular ceiling light panel emitting bright white illumination
stacked industrial cargo containers with hazard markings
transparent glass partitions revealing red-lit interior spaces

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a larger hub chamber dominated by an A3 elevator with glowing red interior. Overhead skylights provide bright white illumination contrasting with the red accent lighting. Storage crates line the left side while glass walls on the right reveal additional facility sections. The camera moves through this transitional space toward the B section.

scene_state.functional_zone: B section server corridor with illuminated rack arrays

agents.ego_description: navigating through B section past server racks and following directional floor markings

entered.detail: illuminated sign with letter B and downward arrow indicating section entrance
tall vertical server racks with red LED indicator lights lining the corridor
recessed floor lights emitting red glow along walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving past the A3 elevator, the camera enters the B section marked by overhead signage. The corridor is flanked by tall server rack arrays with pulsing red LED lights. The floor features white directional arrows and red accent lighting as the camera progresses toward a stairwell at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal stairwell ascending to upper level

events.description: entering enclosed stairwell from server corridor, lighting shifts to cooler tones
beginning ascent up metal grated staircase with handrails

agents.ego_description: climbing the metal stairwell toward an upper level door, transitioning from red to blue-white lighting

entered.detail: steep metal staircase with perforated treads and industrial handrails
metal pipe handrails along staircase walls
doorway at top of stairs with green indicator light
exposed conduit and piping running along stairwell ceiling

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a vertical metal stairwell. The camera leaves the red-lit server room behind and begins ascending grated metal stairs with pipe handrails. The lighting shifts to cooler blue-white tones as the camera climbs toward an upper level doorway visible at the stairwell's peak.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, red-lit ventilation shaft into a spacious, brightly lit industrial hub. It begins in a narrow corridor where red emergency neon tubes illuminate metal panel walls and a large spinning ventilation fan. As the camera moves forward over metal grate flooring, the red glow fades into a darker maintenance corridor marked by a green status light strip on the left wall. The scene then opens through a doorway into a larger hub chamber, where the lighting shifts from dim corridors to bright white overhead skylights. Finally, the camera glides past storage crates and glass walls toward the B section, passing a prominent A3 elevator with a glowing red interior.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a red-lit industrial server corridor into a cool-toned vertical stairwell. It begins by passing the A3 elevator and entering the B section, moving along a corridor flanked by tall server rack arrays with pulsing red LED lights. As the camera progresses over white directional arrows and red accent lighting, the narrow space leads directly toward a stairwell at the corridor's end. The scene then shifts as the camera leaves the red glow behind to ascend grated metal stairs with pipe handrails. Finally, the lighting transitions to cooler blue-white tones while the camera climbs toward an upper level doorway visible at the peak of the stairwell.
